class.name: InstancedRenderer3DLODConfiguration
class.brief_description: Represents a single LOD (Level of Detail) level for an InstancedRenderer3D.
class.description: [b]InstancedRenderer3DLODConfiguration[/b] is a resource that defines the rendering properties for one LOD level used by [InstancedRenderer3D]. Each LOD level has its own mesh and visibility range settings, allowing for efficient rendering of multiple instances at different distances.

method.name: get_mesh
method.description: Returns the mesh used for this LOD level.

method.name: get_visibility_range_begin
method.description: Returns the starting distance from which this LOD level is visible.

method.name: get_visibility_range_begin_margin
method.description: Returns the margin for the visibility_range_begin threshold.

method.name: get_visibility_range_end
method.description: Returns the distance from which this LOD level becomes hidden.

method.name: get_visibility_range_end_margin
method.description: Returns the margin for the visibility_range_end threshold.

method.name: get_visibility_range_fade_mode
method.description: Returns the fade mode for visibility range transitions.

method.name: set_mesh
method.description: Sets the mesh used for this LOD level.

method.name: set_visibility_range_begin
method.description: Sets the starting distance from which this LOD level is visible. A value of 0 disables the range check.

method.name: set_visibility_range_begin_margin
method.description: Sets the margin for the visibility_range_begin threshold. Acts as a hysteresis distance or fade distance depending on the fade mode.

method.name: set_visibility_range_end
method.description: Sets the distance from which this LOD level becomes hidden. A value of 0 disables the range check.

method.name: set_visibility_range_end_margin
method.description: Sets the margin for the visibility_range_end threshold. Acts as a hysteresis distance or fade distance depending on the fade mode.

method.name: set_visibility_range_fade_mode
method.description: Sets the fade mode for visibility range transitions.

members.member: Mesh resource used for this LOD level.
Distance at which this LOD level starts being visible.
Margin applied to visibility_range_begin for hysteresis or fade transitions.
Distance at which this LOD level stops being visible.
Margin applied to visibility_range_end for hysteresis or fade transitions.
Fade mode used when entering or leaving this LOD visibility range.
